title: ostericum scaberulum var. scaberulum
intro: Ostericum scaberulum var. scaberulum, also known as the lesser burdock, is a plant species in the carrot family, with the scientific name Ostericum scaberulum. It is a perennial herb native to East Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The lesser burdock is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
